About Us

Real SEO. Real Results.
No Fluff.

We built Rank Overflow because we were tired of watching great businesses lose organic traffic to competitors — simply because their SEO was broken, slow, or non-existent.

Our Story

Built by Practitioners, Not Account Managers

Rank Overflow was founded by a team of hands-on SEO practitioners who had seen too many businesses pay for reports that changed nothing. We focus on real, measurable improvements — on-page SEO, technical fixes, page speed, and content that ranks.

We started with one philosophy: results you can measure in revenue, not rankings. Rankings are a means to an end. The end is growth — more customers, more revenue, more market share.

We've already delivered results for clients in the Netherlands and Belgium — driving tens of thousands of organic impressions, slashing page load times, and building solid SEO foundations that compound over time.

8+
Years in Business
250+
Clients Served
$12M+
Revenue Generated
RANK
OVER
FLOW
98% Client Retention Rate
The Team

Senior Strategists, Not Junior Executors

Every client gets a dedicated senior-level strategist. No handoffs to account coordinators.

ZK

Zain Khan

Founder & Head of Strategy

8 years in SEO, formerly at Publicis Sapient. Obsessed with technical SEO and scalable content systems.

FA

Farwa Aslam

Head of Content & Topical Authority

Former journalist turned content strategist. Built topical clusters for 40+ brands across industries.

OR

Omar Raza

Lead Technical SEO Engineer

Specialist in crawl optimization, Core Web Vitals, and JavaScript SEO. 200+ technical audits delivered.

SB

Sara Baig

Link Acquisition & Digital PR

Relationship-first link builder with an editorial network spanning 500+ real publishers worldwide.

Our Values

What We Stand For

📊

Data Over Opinion

Every recommendation is grounded in data. We don't guess, we measure, test, and iterate.

🔬

Transparency Always

You own your data, your rankings, your content. Full access to everything, always.

🎯

Revenue-First Thinking

Rankings don't pay salaries. We align every KPI to what actually grows your business.

🤝

Long-Term Partnership

We think in years, not months. SEO compounds. We build systems that pay dividends forever.

Work With Us →
● RankOverflow

Europe's results-driven SEO agency. We help businesses rank higher, grow faster, and win more customers through organic search.
